reason: The tweet contains violent rhetoric typical of ISIS messaging, specifically threatening beheading ('نطيّر رأسك') and celebrating mutilation of those who oppose ISIS/Daesh. The sectarian term 'Rafidi' is also commonly used by ISIS to refer to their opponents.
original_post: الرافضي كتب على رجليه " داعش " فقطعوها له المرة الجايه أكتب على رأس على شان نطيّر رأسك)
